Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: 1. Understand User Goal: The user wants two POWL models based on a provided textual description of a hiring process at GlobalTeq Solutions. One model should include a potential unfairness an XOR branch for community affiliation check and the other should be fair no special branch all go through the same cultural fit check.

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: 2. Analyze the Process Description: Step 1 Resume Parsing Initial Data Check. Includes a loop for missing info. Activities ReceiveApplication DataCompletenessCheck RequestMoreInfo. Step 2 Preliminary Skill Assessment Activity SkillAssessment. Step 3 Cultural Fit Community Affiliation Check. XOR branch either CulturalFitCheck standard OR CommunityAffiliationCheck biased. Step 4 Managerial Review Final Decision.

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: 3. Understand POWL Syntax Structure: Transition label for activities. OperatorPOWL operator Operator.XOR children for exclusive choice. OperatorPOWL operator Operator.LOOP children for loops execute A then optionally B then A again. StrictPartialOrder nodes order with add_edge for sequencing.

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: 4. Design Model 1 Unfair: Activities ReceiveApplication DataCompletenessCheck RequestMoreInfo SkillAssessment CulturalFitCheck CommunityAffiliationCheck ManagerialReview FinalDecision. Loop OperatorPOWL LOOP DataCompletenessCheck RequestMoreInfo. XOR OperatorPOWL XOR CulturalFitCheck CommunityAffiliationCheck. StrictPartialOrder nodes with sequential order edges ReceiveApplication to loop to SkillAssessment to XOR to ManagerialReview to FinalDecision.

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: 5. Design Model 2 Fair: Same activities except no CommunityAffiliationCheck or XOR. Loop same. Then sequential ReceiveApplication to loop to SkillAssessment to CulturalFitCheck to ManagerialReview to FinalDecision.

Name: Validation - PE
Text: 6. Refine according to POWL specifications: Verify loop fits DataCompletenessCheck A RequestMoreInfo B. XOR matches either standard or biased path. Partial order sequential edges correct. Syntax matches example imports classes constructors add_edge.

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: 7. Self-Correction Verification: Does the loop structure match description. Does the XOR match. Are the sequential steps correct. Refine loop children order DataCompletenessCheck first. No need for SilentTransition. Verify StrictPartialOrder initialization.

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Structure of the response Brief introduction Code for Model 1 with comments Code for Model 2 with comments Explanation mapping to description differences bias in XOR removal in fair model.
